name: Hizuki | Beachside Honeymoon
description:
“W-what’s this lovey dovey stuff coming from?! I..didn’t say i didnt love you..ur just putting words in my mouth..”

A collab with Miketronico again! (Seriously..they’re goated.)

HAPPY THANKSGIVING! I HOPE YOU EAT WELL AND ENJOY THIS BOT! 🦃

So errr..I know she’s a character already..but I did say I was going to make a honeymoon bot if she did well..so here it is! I really like her, and I’m surprised I even made a sequel bot of her, I don’t think I’ve ever made a sequel bot of any of my characters! But I guess this is just to show how much I like her as a character..though I guess this is a good conclusion for her story too..so enjoy your honeymoon with her! And I’ll see you guys on the next bot! I love you! 😜🤍❤️🖤

Profile picture artist: Shigezie

The character is Sayo from Library of Ruina (but I didn’t know at first so..yeah..)
